commits: 7f0b1b6 - bober(sprint-1): add bi-temporal SQLite semantic-facts store + bober facts CLI

criteriaResults.evidence: npm run build (tsc) exits 0; better-sqlite3 + @types/better-sqlite3 added and compiled.
npm run typecheck exits 0, zero type errors.
FactStore exports insertFact, getActiveFacts(scope,subject?,predicate?), getFact, invalidateFact, close; ctor accepts ':memory:'/path; no Date.now/new Date inside store (only JSDoc).
semantic_facts 11 columns + idx_facts_sp (scope,subject,predicate) and idx_facts_active (scope,t_invalidated); fully parameterized SQL.
npm test -- facts: 5 tests pass (insert→active, invalidate→absent-but-getFact, id determinism, subject filter, double-invalidate false).
CLI add/list/show/invalidate exercised against dist; unknown-id invalidate exits 1 without throwing.
npm run lint: 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings in eval-persist.test.ts).

notes: Pre-existing scanner.test.ts failure (detects bober commit messages in recent git history) was present BEFORE this sprint — confirmed against stash-clean HEAD; zero new regressions. FactStore interface keeps better-sqlite3 types from leaking (swappable). facts.db default path .bober/memory/facts.db (programming scope). Leftover test db removed by orchestrator post-run.
